zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess Margaret de Champagne於1240年出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納時，她的父親Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre39歲，母親Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre29歲。她於1255年7月10日與Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen在法國洛萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年10月3日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年67歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess Margaret de Champagne于1240年出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納时，她的父亲Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre39岁，母亲Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre29岁。她于1255年7月10日与Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen在法国洛萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年10月3日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年67岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Champagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Cecile, Emile, Normand, Pierre, Alain, Antoine, Evens, Fernand.

French: habitational name from Champagne, a historical province in the northeast of France, named in Latin as Campania (from campus ‘plain, flat land’). This is also the name of various villages in France, and in some cases the surname may derive from one of these. This surname is also found in Haiti (see also 2 below). Compare Champaign , Champaigne , Champine , and Shampine .
Haitian: from Champagne (see 1 above), used as a nickname or personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess Margaret de Champagne was born in 1240, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, her father, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, was 39 and her mother, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, was 29. She married Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen on 10 July 1255, in Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 October 1307, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess Margaret de Champagne est née en 1240, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen le 10 juillet 1255, à Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1307, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess Margaret de Champagne 1240 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre 39 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre 29. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1255 in Lothringen, Frankreich Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1307 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Margaret de Champagne è nata il nel 1240 nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, sua padre, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen il 10 luglio 1255, nel Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1307, nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess Margaret de Champagneが1240年にスペインナファロアイルnアで生まれた時，父Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarreは39歳，母Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarreは29歳であった。1255年7月10日にフランスロレィヌでFriedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年10月3日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで67歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess Margaret de Champagne(이)가 1240년 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1255년 7월 10일 프랑스 로레이인에서 Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 10월 3일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Margaret de Champagne nasceu em 1240, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen em 10 de julho de 1255, em Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1307, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess Margaret de Champagne родилась в 1240 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания, её отцу по имени Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen 10 июля 1255 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 октября 1307 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duchess Margaret de Champagne nació en 1240, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, su papá, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen el 10 de julio de 1255, en Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1307, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
